title: Cataclysm Summons
description: Adds craftable summons for 7 main bosses of Cataclysm that can be used inside corresponding dungeons.
body:
Allows you to summon 7 main bosses from Cataclysm. Use is only possible in the corresponding dungeons, and the summoning item is consumed upon use.
![too far from dungeon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d380ac5ef204f5317de3b81e3321630d2f44c4fc.png)
**Crafts**
